title: Sharp: sample landing template
desc: Demonstration landing page. All text is sample (dummy) content.

sections.sub: Classic cuts, hot-towel shaves and beard work by barbers who care. Walk in scruffy, walk out ready.
From a quick tidy-up to the full service, our chairs have you covered.
cards: Tailored to your hair, your face and the look you want.
A close, relaxing shave with warm towels and a steady hand.
Shape, trim and line-up for a beard that looks intentional.
Crisp, clean fades blended exactly the way you like them.
Booked slots run on time, so you are never left waiting.
Patient barbers and a calm chair for the little ones too.

sections.text: Tell us what you want, or let us suggest something. We listen first, then cut, so you leave with exactly the style you pictured.
bullets: Styling tips you can repeat at home
Finished with a wash and hot towel

sections.h2: A spot that feels like your own.
sections.text: No rush, no upsell. Just good music, a proper coffee and a chair where you can actually relax for half an hour.
bullets: Loyalty card: every tenth cut on us

sections.sub: No app, no fuss, just book and show up.
steps: Choose a chair and a time that suits you.
Bring a photo or talk it through with your barber.
Sit back, relax and leave looking your best.

sections.quote: Best fade I have had in years. The barber actually listened, took his time and the hot-towel finish was the cherry on top.
sections.author: Sample Customer

sections.sub: No hidden extras. Every price includes a wash and finish.

items: Do I need to book ahead?
Booking is recommended for busy times, but we always keep a few chairs for walk-ins.
Please do. A reference photo helps your barber nail the look you are after.
Yes. We have patient barbers and a calm chair just right for younger clients.
Every cut includes a consultation, a wash and a hot-towel finish at no extra cost.
Card, contactless or cash, whatever is easiest for you on the day.

sections.sub: Grab a chair with one of our barbers and walk out looking sharp.

sections.tagline: Classic cuts, shaves and beard work by barbers who care. Sample dummy brand for template preview.
sections.copyright: // Sharp is a sample template with dummy content
